sql.title: SQL for Beginners
sql.description: Learn SQL from zero with hands-on practice.
sql.moreComingSoon: More SQL for Beginners lessons are coming soon.

sql_module_0.title: Introduction to SQL
sql_module_0.description: Get started with SQL: what it is, why it's useful, and how databases work.
outcomes: Identify the main purposes of SQL
Explain how data is organized in databases
why: Builds confidence with introduction to sql.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

sql_module_1.title: Reading Data from Tables
sql_module_1.description: Learn how to retrieve data from tables using SELECT statements.
outcomes: Select specific columns from a table
Apply aliases to columns in SELECT statements
why: Builds confidence with reading data from tables.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

sql_module_2.title: Filtering Results
sql_module_2.description: Master filtering data using WHERE clauses and logical operators.
outcomes: Write WHERE clauses to filter data
Apply comparison operators in WHERE clauses
Use AND, OR, NOT in WHERE clauses
why: Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

sql_module_3.title: Sorting and Output Control
sql_module_3.description: Learn to sort results and limit the number of rows returned.
outcomes: Sort results in ascending or descending order
Limit output using LIMIT or TOP
why: Builds confidence with sorting and output control.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

sql_module_4.title: Text Matching and Cleanup
sql_module_4.description: Work with text data: searching, matching, and cleaning up results.
outcomes: Use TRIM, UPPER, LOWER in queries
why: Builds confidence with text matching and cleanup.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

sql_module_5.title: Basic Aggregations
sql_module_5.description: Summarize data with aggregate functions like COUNT, SUM, AVG, MIN, and MAX.
outcomes: Use COUNT, SUM, and AVG functions
why: Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

sql_module_6.title: Multi-Table Queries
sql_module_6.description: Combine data from multiple tables using JOINs.
outcomes: Join multiple tables in one query
why: Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

sql_module_7.title: Practical SQL Projects
sql_module_7.description: Apply your SQL skills to real-world scenarios and mini-projects.
outcomes: Apply SELECT, WHERE, and JOINs in practice
Clean and standardize data using SQL
Integrate multiple SQL concepts in a project
why: Builds confidence with practical sql projects.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.
